question: Buatkan YAML ClusterRoleBinding untuk memberikan akses ClusterRole 'cluster-admin' ke ServiceAccount 'admin-sa' di namespace kube-system

ground_truth.answer:
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: admin-binding
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: admin-sa
  namespace: kube-system
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: cluster-admin
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
context: ClusterRoleBinding: grants cluster-wide permissions defined in a ClusterRole to subjects
ClusterRole: cluster-scoped role that can be referenced by ClusterRoleBinding
